creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun May 25 12:38:28 2014
New Revision: 355187
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/355187
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r355187/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, sort *_DEPENDS
  
  PR:		ports/189548
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-SVN-Notify-Filter-AuthZMail/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/p5-SVN-Notify-Filter-AuthZMail/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-SVN-Notify-Filter-AuthZMail/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:38:24 2014	(r355186)
+++ head/devel/p5-SVN-Notify-Filter-AuthZMail/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:38:28 2014	(r355187)
@@ -8,13 +8,16 @@ CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Determines Subversion accounts to receive email via the authz file
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-SVN-Notify>=2.72:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-SVN-Notify \
-		p5-SVN-Access>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-SVN-Access
-BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-SVN-Notify>=2.72:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-SVN-Notify \
-		p5-SVN-Access>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-SVN-Access
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-SVN-Access>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-SVN-Access \
+		p5-SVN-Notify>=2.72:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-SVN-Notify
+RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-SVN-Access>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-SVN-Access \
+		p5-SVN-Notify>=2.72:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-SVN-Notify
 
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
